summary: Complete testing of Professional Dashboard - Phase 2. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend dashboard page loads correctly and handles auth errors gracefully. Pro marketplace listing page with conditional 'Mon Dashboard' / 'Devenir Pro' button works correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'No route named pro exists in nested children' - this is a dev warning only, file-based routing works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints properly check is_professional flag before allowing access
Withdrawal minimum amount (50€) correctly enforced, also checks available balance
Notifications are sent on application approval/rejection with appropriate links
Service types (mentoring, course, qa_session, live_stream) properly supported
seed_data_creation: Pro user 'pro_test@cryptonai.com' already existed from Phase 1. Test services created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Professional Dashboard complete. Tested endpoints: GET /api/pro/dashboard, PUT /api/pro/dashboard/profile, POST/PUT/DELETE /api/pro/dashboard/services, POST /api/pro/dashboard/withdraw, PUT /api/pro/dashboard/bookings/{id}/status. All backend tests pass. Frontend dashboard page at /pro/dashboard renders correctly when authenticated, shows error message when not authenticated. The floating button on /pro page correctly shows 'Mon Dashboard' for professionals and 'Devenir Pro' for regular users based on is_professional flag.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/pro/dashboard - Returns profile, services, bookings, reviews, withdrawals, stats
PUT /api/pro/dashboard/profile - Updates bio, hourly_rate, is_available, specializations, languages
POST /api/pro/dashboard/services - Creates service (mentoring, course, qa_session, live_stream)
GET /api/pro/dashboard/bookings - Gets bookings with optional status filter
frontend_pages: /pro - Shows 'Mon Dashboard' button for professionals, 'Devenir Pro' for others
/pro/dashboard - Complete dashboard UI with tabs (Overview, Services, Bookings, Earnings)
notifications: pro_approved - Sent when admin approves application, links to /pro/dashboard
pro_rejected - Sent when admin rejects application, links to /pro/apply
booking_status - Sent to client when professional updates booking status

test_results_summary.test_08_create_service_mentoring: PASSED - Service created with all fields
test_results_summary.test_16_withdrawal_minimum_amount: PASSED - Validates min 50€ or insufficient balance
